days.text: Cloudy apart from sunny intervals. Occasional showers. A few thunderstorms. Force 4 to 5 southerly winds with gusts.
Cloudy. Showers. A few thunderstorms. Force 3 to 5 southerly winds with gusts.
Mainly cloudy. Occasional showers. A few thunderstorms. Force 3 to 4 southerly winds with gusts.
Cloudy apart from sunny intervals. A few showers. Force 3 to 4 southerly winds.
Very hot. Fine apart from cloudy periods. A few thundery showers later. Force 2 to 4 west to southwesterly winds with gusts.
